import api from'./authService';export const paymentService={// Payment Methods
async getPaymentMethods(){const response=await api.get('/payments/methods/');return response.data;},async createPaymentMethod(data){const response=await api.post('/payments/methods/create/',data);return response.data;},async deletePaymentMethod(methodId){await api.delete("/payments/methods/".concat(methodId,"/delete/"));},// Payment Intents
async getPaymentIntents(){const response=await api.get('/payments/intents/');return response.data;},async createLoanFeePayment(applicationId){const response=await api.post("/payments/loan-fee/".concat(applicationId,"/"));return response.data;},async createInstallmentPayment(loanId){const response=await api.post("/payments/installment/".concat(loanId,"/"));return response.data;},async confirmPayment(data){const response=await api.post('/payments/confirm/',data);return response.data;},// Transactions
async getTransactions(){const response=await api.get('/payments/transactions/');return response.data;},// Dashboard Stats
async getPaymentStats(){const response=await api.get('/payments/dashboard/stats/');return response.data;}};
